fn id() := produce x
---
Fn(name="id", body=Produce(Variable("x")))
==========
fn suspend() := thunk produce x
---
Fn(name="suspend", body=Thunk(Produce(Variable("x"))))
==========
fn resume() := force job
---
Fn(name="resume", body=Force(Variable("job")))
==========
fn id() := x
---
Fn(name="id", body=Variable("x"))
==========
fn main() := let x = y in produce x
---
Fn(name="main", body=Let(name="x", value=Variable("y"), body=Produce(Variable("x"))))
==========
fn id() := let x = y in z
---
Fn(name="id", body=Let(name="x", value=Variable("y"), body=Variable("z")))
==========
fn id() := let x = y in produce x
---
Fn(name="id", body=Let(name="x", value=Variable("y"), body=Produce(Variable("x"))))
==========
fn main() := let x = let y = z in y in produce x
---
Fn(name="main", body=Let(name="x", value=Let(name="y", value=Variable("z"), body=Variable("y")), body=Produce(Variable("x"))))
